[[General/Legends|General]] '''Derred''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] General who served in the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. In the aftermath of the war, Derred joined Darth [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and defected to the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], along with other high-ranking personnel, including [[Mon Halan]] and, eventually, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
